name: sticky
description: | Use when the user wants to set auto-routing mode: on (every task-shaped message routes), auto (intent-verb messages route — default), or off (no auto-routing). Intent-detection runs by default; use this skill to expand to full sticky or disable entirely. Trigger with /hyperflow:sticky, "make hyperflow sticky", "stop using hyperflow", "is hyperflow sticky", "auto-route to hyperflow", "disable hyperflow auto-routing".
author: jeremylongshore
